AbstractHTML: This package computes the Frobenius normal form and  the Jordan-Chevalley decomposition of a (square) matrix over any field  that is available in GAP. It also computes the Jordan normal form  of matrices over finite fields.

TitlePage.Abstract:
This package computes the Frobenius normal form and  the Jordan-Chevalley decomposition of a (square) matrix over any field  that is available in GAP. It also computes the Jordan normal form  of matrices over finite fields.
            <P/>
            Bug reports, suggestions and comments are, welcome.
            Please submit them to our issue tracker
            <URL>https://github.com/gap-packages/nofoma/issues</URL>.
TitlePage.Acknowledgements:
The original code by Meinolf Geck was cleaned up and made ready for inclusion
            in the &GAP; package distribution Alia Bonnet in 2025, with some assistance
            by Max Horn.

BannerString:
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Loading  nofoma 1.0.1 (Normal forms of matrices), 
by Meinolf Geck (https://pnp.mathematik.uni-stuttgart.de/idsr/idsr1/geckmf/)
and Alia Bonnet (https://github.com/AliaBonnet).
Help about the main functions in this package is obtained by typing:
    ?FrobeniusNormalForm     ?JordanNormalform     ?JordanChevalleyDecMat
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Subtitle: Normal forms of matrices
